name: Fulum Group Holdings Limited
summary: Fulum Group Holdings Limited owns and operates various restaurants in the People's Republic of China. As of September 30, 2020, the company operated 80 restaurants covering 20 restaurants under the Fulum brand; 8 restaurants under the Sportful Garden brand; 48 restaurants under the Fulum Concept line in Hong Kong; and 4 restaurants in Mainland China. It also processes, sells, and distributes food products; provides management services; trades in kitchen utensils and other operating items; owns trademarks; lends money; and holds properties. Fulum Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1992 is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
